_reason: Live eval (embedding API + answer LLM) requires founder budget authorization. No consent in context at execution time (38-04 wave-3 executor).
_invocation: npm run build && OPENAI_API_KEY=<key> RECENSE_MODEL_PROVIDER=claude-headless node scripts/eval/replay-ku-harness.cjs --insight-mode --out scripts/eval/results/38-insight-tokens.json

_env_requirements.OPENAI_API_KEY: required — OpenAI embedding API (only paid component; embed cost ~$0.01-0.05 for 18 KU cases * 2 modes)
_env_requirements.RECENSE_MODEL_PROVIDER: optional — set to claude-headless to route answer/scorer through Max subscription (no ANTHROPIC_API_KEY needed)

_estimated_cost: Embedding only (~$0.01-0.05 per 18 cases * 2 modes); answer+scorer billed to Max subscription via claude-headless (~$0 marginal, real token usage). Confirm against remaining budget at Task 3 checkpoint.

_schema.description: Schema for the live run output. All leaf values shown as 'DEFERRED' or null are placeholders; the real run fills them with measured numbers.

meta.date: ISO-8601 timestamp of the live run
meta.commit: git short hash at run time
meta.total_cases: integer — number of KU cases joined from n20-attribution.jsonl + eval20-ku.jsonl (typically 18)
meta.total_claims: integer — total claims across all cases
meta.composeTokensOff: number — avg compose tokens per case in insight-OFF mode (chars/4 proxy, EVAL-03 convention). T-38-10: measured, not rounded/assumed.
meta.composeTokensOn: number — avg compose tokens per case in insight-ON mode (single insight string when found). Smaller than OFF is the compose-token win.
meta.composeTokenReductionPct: number — ((OFF - ON) / OFF) * 100. Positive = token reduction. The REFLECT-02 evidence number.
meta.kuScoreOff: number 0-1 — KU correctness score in insight-OFF mode (raw K-member neighborhood baseline)
meta.kuScoreOn: number 0-1 — KU correctness score in insight-ON mode (insight payload when available, else neighborhood fallback)
meta.regression: boolean — true if (kuScoreOff - kuScoreOn) * 100 > TOLERANCE_BAND_PTS (2). Phase-35 D-07 no-regression check.

per_case_off.composeTokens: integer — payload token count for this case in OFF mode

per_case_on.composeTokens: integer — payload token count for this case in ON mode (reduced when insight used)
per_case_on.used_insight: boolean — true if a live non-stale insight was found and used as payload
per_case_on.tombstones: integer (same as OFF — consolidation ran once)

meta.deferred_reason: Live eval (embedding API + answer LLM) requires explicit founder budget authorization. Authorized at Task 3 checkpoint: select ship-on, ship-dark, or tune-ceiling and confirm paid-run budget before executing the invocation above.

note: DEFERRED: live run awaits founder budget authorization at Task 3 checkpoint. Run the _invocation command above after authorization to fill this file with measured numbers. T-38-10: composeTokenReductionPct will be a measured percentage with meta (embedder/cache/date/commit), never rounded or assumed.
